name: Movebank
description: List public Movebank studies and selected study metadata through the direct-read service.

auth.hint: The selected operation returns only data made public by owners. Private study access requires a separate authenticated integration.

tools.name: list_public_studies
tools.description: List Movebank studies visible to the public, optionally restricting returned attributes.

params.name: entity_type
params.description: Use study for the selected catalog operation.

params.name: attributes
params.description: Comma-separated study attributes such as id,name,citation,license_type.
